archive_method: ZIP_STORED regular files only; Chrome profile symlinks excluded to avoid No such device/socket portability failures.
browser_render_limitation: Carried from Stage 4: browser screenshots blocked in sandbox; WeasyPrint render proxy and static/validator replay are included.
notes: Final receipt/proof are external sidecars created after final ZIP; ZIP includes pre-final Stage 5 receipt/handoff/export manifest/pointer and all Stage 1-4 artifacts.
